jdbc_connector_best_practices.overview: Best practices and guidelines for creating high-quality JDBC connectors using the IBM Watson Data Platform Connect SDK.

practice.name: Research Database Documentation
practice.description: Always research the official database documentation before filling DSL values
practice.rationale: Accurate configuration prevents runtime errors and ensures proper connector behavior

guidelines.guideline: Verify JDBC driver class name from official documentation
Check default port numbers and URL patterns
Understand schema vs catalog support for the database
Identify system schemas that should be excluded

practice.name: Use Descriptive Connector Names
practice.description: Follow naming conventions for consistency and clarity

practice.name: Remove Example Fields from DSL
practice.description: Clean up all _example and _comment fields before using DSL
practice.rationale: Example fields are for documentation only and should not be in final configuration

practice.name: Specify Complete URL Templates
practice.description: Provide accurate JDBC URL templates with proper placeholder syntax

practice.name: Define Additional Properties Carefully
practice.description: Only add connection properties that are commonly needed

avoid.item: Overly specific properties that few users need
Properties that can be set via jdbc_url_params

practice.name: Always Run in Correct Directory
practice.description: Gradle tasks must be run from the sdk-gen directory

practice.name: Provide Accurate Task Parameters
practice.description: When running Gradle tasks, ensure all parameters are correct

parameter_guidelines.guideline: Use relative paths from sdk-gen directory
DSL file path should use ../ if in parent directory
Connector directory should be relative to sdk-gen

practice.name: Verify Generated Files
practice.description: After each generation step, verify expected files were created

verification_steps.step: Use list_files to check directory structure
Read key files to verify content
Check for error messages in command output

practice.name: Review Customization Summary
practice.rationale: The summary documents what was changed and what still needs to be done

what_to_check.item: Driver class name was updated correctly

practice.name: Add JDBC Driver Dependency
practice.description: The connector needs the JDBC driver JAR to function

approach.name: Maven Dependency
approach.description: Preferred if driver is in Maven Central

approach.name: Local JAR
approach.description: Use if driver not in Maven Central

steps.step: Create lib/ directory in connector project
Copy JDBC driver JAR to lib/

practice.name: Validate Driver Class Name
practice.description: Ensure the JDBC driver class name is correct before building
practice.validation_method: Read the Connector.java file and verify DRIVER_CLASS_NAME constant

common_mistakes.mistake: Typos in fully qualified class name
Using driver class from wrong database

practice.name: Update Test Credentials
practice.description: Generated tests have placeholder credentials that must be updated

what_to_update.field: host - Real database hostname or IP

practice.security_note: Never commit real credentials to version control. Use environment variables or test configuration files that are gitignored.

practice.name: Test Incrementally
practice.description: Run tests after each major change to catch issues early

practice.name: Review Test Coverage
practice.description: Ensure generated tests cover all custom properties

what_to_verify.item: All additional connection properties are tested
Negative tests exist for required properties
Source and target properties are validated

practice.name: Clean Build on Errors
practice.description: If build fails, try a clean build first

practice.name: Use Verbose Output for Debugging
practice.description: Add flags to get more information when troubleshooting

practice.name: Verify JAR Contents
practice.description: After successful build, verify the JAR contains expected files

practice.name: Document Custom Changes
practice.description: If you make manual changes beyond DSL customization, document them

where_to_document.location: README.md - Create if needed with setup instructions

practice.name: Keep DSL File Updated
practice.description: If you modify the connector, update the DSL file to match
practice.rationale: DSL serves as documentation and can be used to regenerate connector

pitfall.description: Running Gradle tasks from wrong directory
pitfall.symptom: Task not found or file not found errors
pitfall.solution: Always cd to sdk-gen directory first

pitfall.description: Incorrect DSL file path in Gradle command
pitfall.solution: Use ../ prefix if DSL is in parent directory

pitfall.symptom: Driver not found or connection errors
pitfall.solution: Verify class name in database documentation

pitfall.description: Not removing example fields from DSL

pitfall.solution: Update test file with real database credentials

category.name: Before Starting
category.item: Research database JDBC driver and URL format

category.name: During DSL Creation
category.item: Define only commonly needed additional properties

category.name: After Code Generation
category.item: Verify all expected files were created

category.name: After Customization
category.item: Verify driver class name is correct
Add JDBC driver dependency to build.gradle

category.name: Before Testing
category.item: Update test credentials with real values
Verify JDBC driver is in classpath

category.name: Before Completion
category.item: JAR file is created in build/libs/
